innerAbility.name: For Bossing
abilities: Damage to monsters inflicted with Abnormal Status +8%

innerAbility.name: For Training
innerAbility.notes: Depending on what's chosen as the 1st Line, choose the other for the 2nd Line

linkSkill.name: Nature's Friend
linkSkill.shortDesc: Damage: +7%\nActivate nature's help upon defeating 20 normal monsters. Increases Damage Against Normal Monsters by 15% for 30 sec. when nature's help is active.\nCooldown: 30 sec.

build: <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/jump-for-joy.png} tip={Jump For Joy!}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/peerless-mountain.png} tip={Peerless Mountain}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/response.png} tip={Response}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-kid.png} tip={Mountain Kid}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-crash.png} tip={Mountain Crash}>

<tt src={/class-icons/common/physical-training.png} tip={Fortune Fitness}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wand-mastery.png} tip={Wand Mastery}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wand-booster.png} tip={Wand Booster}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-seeds.png} tip={Mountain Seeds}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-heaving-river.png} tip={Eruption: Heaving River}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-whirlwind.png} tip={Eruption: Whirlwind}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-sunrise-well.png} tip={Eruption: Sunrise Well}>

<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/geomancy.png} tip={Geomancy}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-traces.png} tip={Dragon Vein Traces}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-echo.png} tip={Dragon Vein Echo}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/immaculate-thought.png} tip={Immaculate Thought}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wakeup-call.png} tip={Wakeup Call}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/manifestation-sunlight-filled-ground.png} tip={Manifestation: Sunlight-Filled Ground}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/manifestation-wind-swing.png} tip={Manifestation: Wind Swing}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/manifestation-where-the-river-courses.png} tip={Manifestation: Where the River Courses}>

<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/nature-master.png} tip={Nature Master}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/best-friend.png} tip={Best Friend}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/in-depth-geomancy.png} tip={In-depth Geomancy}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/insight.png} tip={Insight}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/advanced-wand-mastery.png} tip={Advanced Wand Mastery}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/relaxation.png} tip={Relaxation}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/anima-warrior.png} tip={Anima Warrior}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/absorption-sunlit-grain.png} tip={Absorption: Sunlit Grain}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/absorption-fierce-wind.png} tip={Absorption: Fierce Wind}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/absorption-river-puddle-douse.png} tip={Absorption: River Puddle Douse}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/anima-heros-will.png} tip={Anima Hero's Will}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-embrace.png} tip={Mountain Embrace}>
details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

hyperBuild.recommended: <bp_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-absorption-reinforce.png} tip={Eruption/Absorption - Reinforce}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-absorption-boss-rush.png} tip={Eruption/Absorption - Boss Rush}> Eruption/Absorption - Reinforce and Boss Rush_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle-boss-rush.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle - Boss Rush}> Essence Sprinkle - Boss Rush_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wakeup-call-cooldown-cutter.png} tip={Wakeup Call - Cooldown Cutter}> Wakeup Call - Cooldown Cutter_>[Options for Last Point]<bp_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-embrace-extra-shield.png} tip={Mountain Embrace - Extra Shield}> Mountain Embrace - Extra Shield_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-enhance.png} tip={Dragon Vein - Enhance}> Dragon Vein - Enhance_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-absorption-guardbreak.png} tip={Eruption/Absorption - Guardbreak}> Eruption/Absorption - Guardbreak_<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-seeds-reinforce.png} tip={Mountain Seeds - Reinforce}> Mountain Seeds - Reinforce_>

nodes: <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle-boost.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-eruption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Eruption (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-absorption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Absorption (4th Job)}>

<tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-seeds.png} tip={Mountain Seeds (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-kid.png} tip={Mountain Kid (1st Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wakeup-call.png} tip={Wakeup Call (3rd Job)}>
notes: Any combination of these skills are good but preferred from same category as you want to max primary first
4 Boost Nodes total are needed to reach Master Level 60 for these skills (with Matrix Points used)<bp_Nodes with the same Main Skill (skill at the top) cannot be equipped at the same time_>

possible.nodes: <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle-boost.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-kid.png} tip={Mountain Kid (1st Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/mountain-seeds.png} tip={Mountain Seeds (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-eruption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Eruption (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wakeup-call.png} tip={Wakeup Call (3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-traces.png} tip={Dragon Vein Traces (3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-absorption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Absorption (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/vine-coil.png} tip={Vine Coil (Hyper Skill)}>

content.specialThanks: Special thanks to the members of the Lara Discord for their help in making this overview!
credits: Inner Ability + Hyper Passive Build + Boost Nodes Build + Infographic

primary.name: Shapeshift
primary.shortDesc: Hide your horns.\nCooldown: 10 sec.
details: This skill is obtained from the Lara storyline

primary.name: To Narin!
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 5. Moves you to Narin.\nCooldown: 600 sec.
details: This skill is obtained from the Lara storyline

primary.name: Spirit Affinity
primary.shortDesc: Minion Duration +10%

primary.name: Exclusive Spell
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Duration: 2400 sec, Attack Power & Magic ATT: +4%\nCooldown: 300 sec.
details: To obtain this skill, complete Lara's storyline and the quest <link href={https://maplestorywiki.net/w/Quests/242/The_Secret_of_the_Bell} title={"The Secret of the Bell"}>
Affects all nearby players

primary.name: Essence Sprinkle
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 16, Damage: 80%, Number of Attacks: 4, Max Enemies Hit: 5
primary.desc: Cast a burst of magic forward

primary.name: Jump for Joy!
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10. Allows you to jump a greater distance.
primary.desc: Double jump skill
details: Can be assigned a Key Slot or activated by pressing jump twice<bp_While in the air, pressing together with the Up Arrow Key will perform a vertical jump_>

primary.name: Mountain Crash
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10, Quickly charge forward\n[Passive Effects - Movement Speed +22, Max Movement Speed +20, Jump +20]
primary.desc: Dash forward
details: [Passive]: Permanently increases Movement Speed, Max Movement Speed, and Jump

primary.name: Mountain Kid
primary.shortDesc: Mountain Spirits have a 40% chance to appear when Essence Sprinkle hits. Damage: 85%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Max Hits: 3, Boss Damage: 105%
primary.desc: Successful attacks with <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> have a chance to deal an additional attack
details: Deals increased damage to bosses
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

primary.name: Peerless Mountain
primary.shortDesc: Consume 40 MP to reduce damage taken by 70%.

primary.name: Response
primary.shortDesc: Max HP: +20%, Defense: +100\nDamage Taken: -15%

primary.name: Dragon Vein Eruption
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Activates an Eruption skill that matches the Dragon Vein's attribute.\nIncreases Damage by 1% per 2% increase in Summons Duration.\nCooldown: 0.3 sec.
primary.desc: Summon an [Eruption] stationary spirit that attacks nearby enemies
details: The [Eruption] spirit summoned when used cycles between <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-sunrise-well.png} tip={Eruption: Sunrise Well (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-heaving-river.png} tip={Eruption: Heaving River (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-whirlwind.png} tip={Eruption: Whirlwind (2nd Job)}>
While casting, gain 100% Knockback Resistance
Unaffected by %Summon Duration but instead increases %Damage based on %Summon Duration
[Eruption] skills are unaffected by Damage Reflect

primary.name: Eruption: Heaving River
primary.shortDesc: River Spirit Duration: 16 sec. Surge Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 260%, Number of Attacks: 4, Max Surges: 8
primary.desc: Summon a River Spirit that attacks nearby enemies

primary.name: Eruption: Whirlwind
primary.shortDesc: Wind Spirit Duration: 16 sec. Whirlwind Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 90%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 5, Max Whirlwinds: 5
primary.desc: Summon a Wind Spirit that continuously damages enemies in an area

primary.name: Eruption: Sunrise Well
primary.shortDesc: Giant Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 145%, Number of Attacks: 6. After attack, Lava Area Duration: 16, Damage: 110% per 1 sec., Number of Attacks: 1, Max Enemies Hit: 10\nPeriodically creates 4 volcanic bomb(s). Volcanic Bomb Damage: 95%, Number of Attacks: 3, Max Volcanic Bombs: 9. If several volcanic bombs hit a single enemy, Final Damage for the second volcanic bomb and onwards: -10%. Damage Over Time for enemies hit by volcanic bombs: 60% damage for 8 sec.
primary.desc: Summon a Sunlight Spirit that explodes and creates a lingering damaging zone
details: The lingering zone will also periodically creates bombs that damage enemies<bp_Enemies hit are applied a damaging debuff_Enemies hit by multiple bombs take reduced %Final Damage after the first bomb_Bombs will prioritize boss monsters starting with the highest HP within the area_>

primary.name: Mountain Seeds
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20. Mountain Spirit Duration: 10 sec., Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 55%, Number of Attacks: 1.\nMax Mountain Spirits on Map: 3\n1 Mountain Seed is recharged every 10 sec., and you can hold up to 3 at a time.
primary.desc: Summon a sprit that attacks nearby enemies and pushes enemies towards [Eruption] skills
details: Gain 1 Mountain Spirit every 10 secs (max. 3)
Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together will summon all available spirits at once
Using the skill while casting <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-eruption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Eruption (2nd Job)}> will cause no cast animation while planting
Right-clicking the skill will toggle Auto Use ON/OFF to summon a seed each time an [Eruption] skill is used
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

primary.name: Wand Booster
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 24, Increases Magic Attack Speed for 180 sec.
primary.desc: Increases Attack Speed (by 2 stages)

primary.name: Wand Mastery
primary.shortDesc: Wand Mastery: +50%\nMagic ATT: +35

primary.name: Fortune Fitness
primary.shortDesc: Intelligence: +40

primary.name: Manifestation: Where the River Courses
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80. Use the skill to designate an end point within 20 sec. River Duration between Start Point and End Point: 90 sec. Press the up arrow key at the start point to travel along the river.\nCooldown: 60 sec.\n[Passive Effect: Heaving River Damage: +120% points]
primary.desc: Using the skill sets a [Start Point] and and an [End Point] that can be used to travel between two points
details: [Passive]: Permanently increases %Damage of <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-heaving-river.png} tip={Eruption: Heaving River (2nd Job)}> by a flat amount
Press the Up Arrow Key at the [Start Point] to travel along the river
Two points must be created before travelling along the river
Gain 100% Knockback Resistance and can attack while travelling

primary.name: Manifestation: Wind Swing
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 80, Wind Swing Duration: 30 sec.
Area Buff: Speed: +20, Jump: +20
Buff Duration for Self: 120 sec, Buff Duration for Party Members: 20 sec.
Press the up arrow key and hold down jump in mid-air within the area of the wind swing to float midair for up to 4.5 sec.
Cooldown: 60 sec.
[Passive Effect: Whirlwind Damage: +35% (additive), Attack Speed: +1 level]
primary.desc: Create a zone that increases Speed and Jump to party members within it
details: [Passive]: Permanently increases Attack Speed and increases %Damage of <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-whirlwind.png} tip={Eruption: Whirlwind (2nd Job)}> by a flat amount
Pressing the Down Arrow Key and holding the Jump Key within the buff zone allows you to float briefly<bp_Right-clicking the skill will toggle ON/OFF this ability for party members_>
Duration of buff is shorter for party members
Gain 100% Knockback Resistance during casting animation

primary.name: Manifestation: Sunlight-Filled Ground
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 80, Sunlight Area Duration: 20 sec., Area Buff: Damage: +25%
Buff Duration on Self: 120 sec., Buff Duration on Party Members: 20 sec.
HP Recovered in Area: 10% of Max HP every 2 sec.
Cooldown: 60 sec.
[Passive Effect: Sunrise Well Damage: +48% points]
primary.desc: Create a zone that increases %Damage and recovers %Max HP to party members within it
details: [Passive]: Increases %Damage of <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/eruption-sunrise-well.png} tip={Eruption: Sunrise Well (2nd Job)}> by a flat amount
Duration of buff is shorter for party members
Gain 100% Knockback Resistance during casting animation

primary.name: Wakeup Call
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30. Intangible Forces: 7, Damage: 105%, Number of Attacks: 4\nIf several intangible forces land hits on a single enemy, Final Damage for the second intangible force onwards: -40%\nCooldown: 9 sec.
primary.desc: Fire homing missiles that seek out nearby enemies
details: Enemies hit by multiple missiles take reduced %Final Damage after the first missile
Missiles prioritize bosses with the highest HP first
Gain 100% Knockback Resistance during casting animation
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

primary.name: Dragon Vein Traces
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 65. Uses 1 Earthly Energy. Max Enemies Hit: 5, Damage: 500%, Number of Attacks: 2\n1 Earthly Energy is recharged every 10 sec., and you can hold up to 2 at a time.
primary.desc: Teleport forward and damage nearby enemies around the location
details: Uses a special resource called [Earthly Energy]<bp_Gain 1 Earthly Energy every 10 secs (max. 2)_>
The direction of the teleport can be controlled by pressing an Arrow Key and Skill Key together

primary.name: Dragon Vein Echo
primary.shortDesc:
Direct attacks restore 1% of Max HP and increase Final Damage by 5% for 20 sec
MP Absorbtion Chance: 30%, Amount Absorbed: 5% of Max MP
Amount Absorbed from Bosses: 3% of Max MP
HP Recovery Cooldown: 5 sec
primary.desc: Periodically, successful direct attacks restore %Max HP and grants a %Final Damage buff
details: Additionally, attacks have a chance to steal a portion of the enemy's %Max MP<bp_MP absorption effectiveness is reduced for bosses_>

primary.name: Immaculate Thought
primary.shortDesc: Damage: +20%, Boss Damage: +10%, Critical Rate: +20%\nMax MP: +30%, Knockback Resistance: +40%

primary.name: Geomancy
primary.shortDesc:
Essence Sprinkle Damage: +50% points
Mountain Kid Damage: +35% points
Mountain Kid Boss Damage: +45% points
Mountain Seed Damage: +75% points

primary.name: Dragon Vein Absorption
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Summon sun, river, or wind spirits for 120 sec\nCooldown: 0.3 sec.
primary.desc: While active, successful attacks with <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> periodically activates additional [Absorption] attacks
details: While casting, gain 100% Knockback Resistance
[Eruption] skills are unaffected by cooldown resets and Damage Reflect

primary.name: Absorption: River Puddle Douse
primary.shortDesc: When Essense Sprinkle hits, a River Spirit appears and attacks enemies for 120 sec. Damage: 570%, Number of Attacks: 3\nCooldown: 5 sec.
primary.desc: Successful attacks with <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> causes a River Spirit to appear and damage nearby enemies

primary.name: Absorption: Fierce Wind
primary.shortDesc: When Essense Sprinkle hits, a fierce wind appears and moves forward for 120 sec. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 150%, Number of Continuous Attacks: 3, Max Attacks Per Enemy: 6\nCooldown: 5 sec.
primary.desc: Successful attacks with <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> causes a Wind Spirit to appear that travels forward and continuously damage nearby enemies

primary.name: Absorption: Sunlit Grain
primary.shortDesc: When Essense Sprinkle hits, Sunlight Spirrits appear and create 5 fireball(s) that pursue and attack enemies for 120 sec. Damage: 150%, Number of Attacks: 6\nWhen a single enemy is struck by several fireballs, starting with the second fireball, Final Damage: -60%\nCooldown: 5 sec.
primary.desc: Successful attacks with <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> causes a Sun Spirit to appear and create fireballs that seek out nearby enemies
details: Enemies hit by multiple fireballs take reduced %Final Damage after the first fireball
Prioritizes bosses with the highest HP first

primary.name: Dragon Vein Conversion
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, Press direction keys within 3 sec of using the skill to convert the target Dragon Vein's attribute to be erupted into a different attribute.\nCooldown: 1 sec.
primary.desc: Using the Arrow Keys, choose which [Eruption] spirit is summoned next using <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-eruption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Eruption (2nd Job)}>
details: While casting, gain 100% Knockback Resistance

primary.name: Nature Master
primary.shortDesc:
Eruption Skill Duration: 30 sec
Heaving River
Surge Max Monsters Hit: +2, Number of Attacks: 5, Damage: 882%, Max Surge Count: 15.
Whirlwind
Increases whirlwind range, Max Monsters Hit: +4, Damage: 300%, Max Whirlwind Count: 10
Sunrise Well
Giant Max Monsters Hit: +4, Damage: 530%. Increases lava area creation range, Lava Area Damage: 400%, Volcanic Bomb Damage: 270%, Damage Over Time for enemies hit with volcanic bombs: 125%. Creates volcanic bombs more frequently, 5 at a time, up to 13 time(s).
details: [Eruption] skills are improved but do not receive the passive effects from [Manifestation] skills
Increases [Eruption] Skill Duration
Each individual upgrade are described below

primary.name: Nature Master - Heaving River Upgrade
details: Increases %Damage, Number of Hits, and Max Enemies Hit

primary.name: Nature Master - Whirlwind Upgrade
details: Increases range of attack
Increases %Damage and Max Enemies Hit

primary.name: Nature Master - Sunrise Well Upgrade
details: Increases %Damage of initial attack
Increases the %Damage and size of the lingering zone
Increases the %Damage of the bombs and damaging debuff
Bombs are now created more frequently

primary.name: Best Friend
primary.shortDesc: Increases Essence Sprinkle attack range, MP Cost: 25, Max Enemies Hit: +1, Damage: +340%
details: Improves <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/essence-sprinkle.png} tip={Essence Sprinkle (1st Job)}> and skill still receives the passive effect from <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/geomancy.png} tip={Geomancy (3rd Job)}>
Increases Attack Range, %Damage and Max Enemies Hit of attack

primary.name: Mountain Embrace
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 150, Duration: 8, Damage Taken, including attacks that deal damage in proportion to Max HP: -55%. Protects against debilitating status conditions\nCooldown: 60 sec.
primary.desc: While active, reduces damage taken including %Max HP attacks and prevents Critical Abnormal Statuses
details: Unaffected by cooldown resets and %Buff Duration

primary.name: Anima Warrior
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70, Grandis Goddess appears\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: Anima Hero's Will
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Cooldown: 300 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for 3 secs
details: Unaffected by <tt src={/class-icons/explorers/paladin/combat-orders.png} tip={Temporarily increases all of your skill levels. Only 4th Job Skills can be increased beyond master level while other skills can only be increased to master level. Exceptions: Some special skills, beginner skills, Combat Orders, hyper skills, 5th job skills, and 6th job skills cannot be increased.}/> Combat Orders

primary.name: Advanced Wand Mastery
primary.shortDesc: Wand Mastery: +70%\nFinal Damage: +30%, Magic ATT: +50, Attack Speed: +1
details: Increases %Weapon Mastery provided
Additionally, increases %Final Damage, Attack Speed (by 1 stage) and grants flat Magic Attack

primary.name: In-depth Geomancy
primary.shortDesc:
Mountain Kid Appearance Rate: +70%, Increases Mountain Kid attack range
Mountain Kid Damage: +208% points, Boss Monster Damage: +260% points
Mountain Seed Damage: +500% points, Mountain Seed Duration: +20 sec.
Wakeup Call Damage: +95% points
Dragon Vein Traces Damage: +55% points

primary.name: Insight
primary.shortDesc: Critical Rate: +20%, Critical Damage: +20%, Final Damage: +45%, Monster DEF Ignored: +40%

primary.name: Relaxation
primary.shortDesc: Magic ATT: +50, Status Resistance: +30, Elemental Resistance: +30%, Knockback Resistance: +60%

hyperPassive.name: Eruption/Absorption - Guardbreak
details: Increases %Ignore DEF of Eruption and Absorption skills

hyperPassive.name: Eruption/Absorption - Reinforce
details: Increases %Damage of Eruption and Absorption skills

hyperPassive.name: Eruption/Absorption - Boss Rush
details: Increases %Boss Damage of Eruption and Absorption skills

hyperPassive.name: Dragon Vein Echo - Enhance
hyperPassive.shortDesc: While Dragon Vein Echo is active, Speed: +30, Jump: +20, Recovers 3% of Max HP every 5 sec

hyperPassive.name: Mountain Embrace - Extra Shield
hyperPassive.shortDesc: Create a shield equal to 15% of Max HP every 1 sec while Mountain Embrace is active. The shield disappears 1 sec after Mountain Embrace ends.

hyperPassive.name: Dragon Vein - Enhance
hyperPassive.shortDesc: Will not be knocked back by any attack while casting skills that consume Dragon Veins.

hyperActive.name: Unconstrained Dragon Vein
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 500, Duration: 20 sec., Final Damage: +9%\nCooldown: 60 sec.

hyperActive.name: Vine Coil
hyperActive.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 300, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 467%, Number of Attacks: 6
Stun Duration for Attacked Enemies: 10 sec
Stun Duration: +100%, depending on damage inflicted with Vine Coil.
Cooldown: 120 sec.
hyperActive.desc: Release an attack that binds nearby enemies hit

hyperActive.name: Arbor Away
hyperActive.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 500, Tree Duration: 20 sec.
Monster Defense when in the tree's area: -15% for remaining Tree Duration
When Lara is in the tree's area, Knockback Resistance: +100%, Boss Damage: +30%, Critical Damage: +10%
Clears Lara's Abnormal Status every 1.3 sec.
Cooldown: 120 sec.
hyperActive.desc: Summon a tree that grants a buff while you are within it and debuffs enemies within it
details: [Buff]: Increases %Knockback Resistance, %Boss Damage, and %Crit Damage<bp_Also periodically clears Abnormal Statuses_>
[Debuff]: Reduces %Enemy DEF<bp_Reduction to %DEF can be considered as %Ignore DEF_>
Unaffected by cooldown resets

fifthMain.name: Big Stretch
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 500. Intangible Forces: 15, Damage: 4455%, Number of Attacks: 5\nIf several intangible forces hit a single enemy, Final Damage for the second force and onwards: -30%\nCooldown: 60 sec.
fifthMain.desc: Fire homing missiles that seek out nearby enemies
details: Enemies hit by multiple missiles take reduced %Final Damage after the first missile
Prioritizes bosses with the highest HP first
While casting, gain 100% Knockback Resistance
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

fifthMain.name: Land's Connection
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1200, Land spirits appear in the order of Mountain, River, Wind, and Sunlight, shocking enemies with 1540% Damage 3 time(s). Number of Attacks: 10, Max Enemies Hit: 10. Afterwards, activates explosion with 2055% Damage 15 time(s), Number of Attacks: 7, Max Enemies Hit: 10.\nCooldown: 120 sec.
fifthMain.desc: Unleash a massive barrage of attacks and finish with a final explosion
details: Unaffected by Damage Reflect

fifthMain.name: Surging Essence
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, Shock enemies with 1870% Damage 6 time(s), Number of Attacks: 8, Max Enemies Hit: 10\nCooldown: 20 sec.
fifthMain.desc: An Earth Spirit appears in front of you that damages nearby enemies

fifthMain.name: Winding Mountain Ridge
fifthMain.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 500. Summons 3 group(s) of Mountain Spirits within a certain range. Once summoned, they periodically run at enemies to attack.
Group Summon Duration: 30 sec. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 1100%, Number of Attacks: 4. Running into enemies decreases running speed.
Max Number of Attacks: 20 per group
Cooldown: 60 sec., Mountain Spirits Cooldown: 1 sec.
fifthMain.desc: Summon several Earth Spirits nearby that travels back and forth damaging enemies in its path
details: If there are enemies nearby, the Earth Spirit will chase towards it, prioritizing boss monsters
Can only be summoned if there is a platform nearby
The Earth Spirit slows down if it collides with an enemy
While summoned, pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together resummons the Earth Spirits at your location
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

masteryCore.name: HEXA Essence Sprinkle
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 35, Max Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 654%, Number of Attacks: 4\n[Passive Effects - Mountain Kid and Mountain Seeds Damage: +700% points]
details: Unlocked with 1st Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: 2nd Mastery Node
details: Requires <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-eruption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Eruption (2nd Job)}> enhanced with V Matrix at least Lv. 40 (before Matrix Points) to unlock

masteryCore.name: HEXA Dragon Vein Eruption
masteryCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 60, Activates an Eruption skill that matches the Dragon Vein's attribute.
Increases Damage by 1% per 2% increase in Summons Duration.
Cooldown: 0.3 sec.
[Passive Effect: Dragon Vein Absorption and HEXA Dragon Vein Absorption Final Damage: +21%]
details: Unlocked with 2nd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Eruption: Heaving River
masteryCore.shortDesc: River Spirit Duration: 30 sec.\nSurge Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 1025%, Number of Attacks: 7, Max Surges: 15
details: Unlocked with 2nd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Eruption: Whirlwind
masteryCore.shortDesc: Wind Spirit Duration: 30 sec\nWhirlwind Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 482%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 5, Max Whirlwinds: 10
details: Unlocked with 2nd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Eruption: Sunrise Well
masteryCore.shortDesc:
Giant Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 890%, Number of Attacks: 6
After attack, Lava Area Duration: 30 sec
Damage: 679% per 1 sec, Number of Attacks: 1, Max Enemies Hit: 10
Periodically creates 5 volcanic bomb(s), Volcanic Bomb Damage: 451%, Number of Attacks: 3
Max Volcanic Bombs: 13, If several volcanic bombs hit a single enemy, Final Damage for the second volcanic bomb and onwards: -10%.
Damage Over Time for enemies hit by volcanic bombs: 195% damage for 8 sec.

masteryCore.name: 3rd Mastery Node
details: Requires <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/dragon-vein-absorption.png} tip={Dragon Vein Absorption (4th Job)}> enhanced with V Matrix at least Lv. 40 (before Matrix Points) to unlock

masteryCore.name: HEXA Dragon Vein Absorption
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 45, Summons sun, river, wind spirits for 120 sec.\nCooldown: 0.3 sec.\n[Passive Effect: HEXA Dragon Vein Eruption Final Damage: +20%]
details: Unlocked with 3rd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Absorption: River Puddle Douse
masteryCore.shortDesc: When Essence Sprinkle hits, a River Spirit appears and attacks enemies for 120 sec. Damage: 774%, Number of Attacks: 5\nCooldown: 5 sec.
details: Unlocked with 3rd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Absorption: Fierce Wind
masteryCore.shortDesc: When Essence Sprinkle hits, a fierce wind appears and moves forward for 120 sec. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 216%, Number of Continuous Attacks: 3\nCooldown: 5 sec.
details: Unlocked with 3rd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Absorption: Sunlit Grain
masteryCore.shortDesc: When Essence Sprinkle hits, Sunlight Spirits appear and create 5 fireball(s) that pursue and attack enemies for 120 sec. Damage: 220%, Number of Attacks: 6\nWhen a single enemy is struck by several fireballs, starting with the second fireball, Final Damage: -55%\nCooldown: 5 sec.
details: Unlocked with 3rd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: 4th Mastery Node
details: Requires <tt src={/class-icons/anima/lara/wakeup-call.png} tip={Wakeup Call (3rd Job)}> enhanced with V Matrix at least Lv. 40 (before Matrix Points) to unlock

masteryCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 45. Intangible Forces: 7, Damage: 1150%, Number of Attacks: 4
If several intangible forces lands hits on a single enemy, Final Damage for the second intangible force onwards: -40%
Cooldown: 15 sec.
[Passive Effect: Eruption/Absorption Skills Final Damage: +15%]
details: Unlocked with 4th Mastery Node

skillCore.name: Universe in Bloom

Nature spirits gather: Number of Flowers: 8, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 2100%, Number of Attacks: 7
The flowers bloom: Vein Energy Release: 64, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 1385%, Number of Attacks: 14
Cooldown: 360 sec

skillCore.name: Cornucopia
skillCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1000, Invincible during casting\nPurifies the enemy 21 times, dealing 8015% damage to up to 15 enemies 14 times\nIgnore Defense: +60%, Boss Damage: +40%, Critical Rate: 100%

meta: Lara is an INT mage class part of the Anima class group. Lara uses Wands as their primary weapons. For their secondary weapon, Lara can equip Ornaments
